results.text: The --thinking-display chokepoint is rewritten so an omitted display defaults to "summarized"
A pristine .js.orig backup is created for the modified bundle
Re-running the patch is idempotent (reports ALREADY PATCHED and makes no further change)
results.evidence: second patch run logged "ALREADY PATCHED", file unchanged

results.text: restore reverts the patched bundle byte-for-byte to the pristine original
the .js.orig backup is consumed/removed after restore
